cards.title: Professional Background
cards.text: Fifteen years of military experience across multiple roles, combined with a current focus on systems engineering and operational excellence.

cards.title: Core Strengths
cards.text: Systems support, leadership, troubleshooting, process improvement, communication, and structured problem-solving.

cards.title: Portfolio Focus
cards.text: Explore my biography, skills and abilities, project experience, resume content, and contact information through the navigation above.

aboutParagraphs: My name is Collin West, and I am currently a Systems Engineer with 15 years of military service, where I have held a variety of leadership and technical positions that have strengthened my skills in systems operations, problem-solving, team coordination, and mission-focused planning. Throughout my military career, I have worked in demanding environments that required adaptability, discipline, attention to detail, and the ability to make sound decisions under pressure. These experiences have shaped the way I approach both technical challenges and professional responsibilities.

In my current role as a Systems Engineer, I focus on designing, supporting, and improving systems that require both technical knowledge and strategic thinking. I enjoy working with technology in ways that create practical solutions, improve efficiency, and support larger organizational goals. My background combines military leadership with engineering and systems-focused work, allowing me to bring a unique perspective to projects that demand both structure and innovation.

This ePortfolio reflects my professional journey, technical capabilities, and continued growth. It highlights my experience, skills, projects, and qualifications while also demonstrating my commitment to excellence, service, and continuous improvement. I take pride in producing work that is organized, dependable, and meaningful, and I aim to continue building on that foundation in both technical and leadership roles.
